## Theme name

What's it called?

## How to get these values

1. Run LinkBreeze locally and open **Theme** (`/theme`) in the admin panel
2. Customize your theme using the visual editor
3. Copy the values from the editor into the JSON below

## Theme JSON

```json
{
  "name": "",
  "backgroundType": "",
  "backgroundValue": "",
  "fontFamily": "",
  "primaryColor": "",
  "textColor": "",
  "linkStyle": "",
  "animationType": ""
}
```

## Screenshot

Attach a screenshot of the theme on the public page (mobile view preferred).
